headline: Claude Code adoption faces skepticism while Anthropic tightens identity verification
body: Anthropic's Claude Code tool is drawing critical scrutiny from developers who question its actual impact on product quality, even as the company introduces new pricing tiers and stricter identity verification for new users. For healthcare AI implementations, this matters significantly because many organizations evaluate Claude-based solutions for clinical documentation, coding assistance, and workflow automation. The gap between promised capabilities and real-world utility means healthcare teams must conduct rigorous pilots before committing to Claude-dependent architectures in regulated settings. Anthropic's new identity verification requirements will also affect healthcare vendor onboarding processes and may add friction to rapid deployment cycles that some value-based care organizations require.
